rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO** IN THE MATTER OF THE BERNARD LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/6/19. Examiner needs more time to review amendment filed on 1/10/19. (Notice for trusts is always 30 days. CRC 7.903(c)(6) merely refers to the manner and frequency of filing accountings.) Notice was waived by the current beneficiary for only the third accounting and the amended fourth accounting, and he consented (unnecessarily) to Mr. Feder being given notice. There is no blanket consent on file by the beneficiary to notice being given to him in care of his Court appointed attorney. [CRC 7.51(a)(2).]
